violations.text: The following equipment were observed in poor repair: 1) The gaskets of the reach-in refrigeration unit were being held with tape 2) The inner plate of the door of the chest freezer was loose and held with tape New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving racks have an accumulation of dust and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2026
The cover for the ceiling light above the pizza prep unit was observed to be in poor repair (cracked). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026

The establishment failed to keep records/logs for using Time as a Public Health Control of pizza slices. PIC instructed to keeps logs at all times. Failure to comply may result in disciplinary action. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024

The following equipment were observed in poor repair: 1) The gaskets of a refrigeration unit were being held with tape 2) The inner plate of the door of the chest freezer was loose and held with tape Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the fans inside of a reach in refrigeration unit and the shelves in the back storage room had an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2024

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed in poor repair: 1) The floor tiles throughout the establishment were missing, cracked, etc. 2) Several ceiling tiles throughout the establishment had heavy water damage Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/01/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the refrigeration units. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Screen must fully reach the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2023

The freezer door was observed in poor repair. (Not fully attached) The gaskets in the dough unit and the reach-in unit was observed in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the vents in the reach-in unit has an accumulation of dust. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023

The tiles in the kitchen/back storage area was observed in poor repair. The ceiling in the back storage area was observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be observed in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2023
